productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Fixed Weast White Capris
description: Style Note Copied from her mom's style, a colour pop pair of denim capris - just what she needs to keep her summer fun and fuss-free! Product Details White capris with a button and zipper closure, loops at the waistband, two pockets in the front and two at the back. Comes with a mint-green fabric belt.
